tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read any file in the repository. Always read a component file before editing it to get its current state. Read the API client (lib/api.ts) before adding new API calls to understand the existing patterns.

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create a new file at the exact path defined in FOLDER_STRUCTURE.md under apps/web/. Never create files outside apps/web/ or packages/types/.
tools.path_rule: Must match apps/web/ paths in FOLDER_STRUCTURE.md

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Edit an existing file using precise string replacement. Read the file first. Make the smallest targeted change — do not rewrite entire components when a small change will do.

tools.name: run_command
tools.description: Execute shell commands for: running the dev server, running TypeScript type checking, running component tests, checking that pages render correctly.

tools.name: search_codebase
tools.description: Search for component names, hook names, store names, or type definitions. Use before creating a new component to check if it already exists. Use when you need to find where a piece of state is managed.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files in apps/web/ directories to verify structure matches FOLDER_STRUCTURE.md.

tool_use_rules: Always read a component before editing it.
Always run npx tsc --noEmit after creating or editing TypeScript files to catch type errors immediately.
Never add a package to package.json that is not in TECH_STACK.md without flagging it.
Never use fetch() directly in a component — always use lib/api.ts.
Never store sensitive data (encryption keys, JWTs) in localStorage or sessionStorage.
Always check that new components are exported from the correct index file.

restricted_tools.name: create_file
restricted_tools.restriction: Do not create any file outside apps/web/ or packages/types/. The backend (services/, apps/worker/) is the Backend Agent's domain.

restricted_tools.name: edit_file
restricted_tools.restriction: Do not edit any file outside apps/web/ or packages/types/.

restricted_tools.name: run_command
restricted_tools.restriction: Do not run database commands, alembic commands, celery commands, or docker-compose. Those are the Backend Agent's responsibility.
